title: Runtime Retention Policy
description: Deterministic rotation and retention rules for all append-only runtime streams, audit logs, heartbeats, and checkpoints.

rules.description: Audit reports retained for 30 days then archived to cold storage.

rules.condition: heartbeat file age > 7 days OR heartbeat count > 1000 per stream
rules.description: Heartbeats rotate weekly or at 1000 entries per stream.

rules.condition: checkpoint is not the latest AND age > 90 days
rules.description: Non-latest checkpoints archived after 90 days. Latest checkpoint always preserved.

rules.condition: event stream size > 10MB OR age > 30 days
rules.description: Event streams rotate at 10MB or 30 days.
Telemetry logs retained for 30 days then archived.
Diagnostic reports retained for 14 days then archived.
Healing logs retained for 30 days then archived.

invariants.description: The latest checkpoint is the canonical resume point and must be immutable.

invariants.expression: every retention action emits governance event
invariants.description: Retention rotation must leave an audit trail.
